reasoning: Emotional (60%): The warm gold/amber frame palette reads correctly for Zelda HUD — not grim, not scary. Small colored accents (blue/red) at corners add charm. However the large white interior fill zone is stark and clinical, undermining the warm bright-Hyrule mood. The overall silhouette is mostly a flat rectangle; the decorative corner elements add some character but are visually scattered (random dot placement) rather than intentional friendly motifs. Emotional score ~6. Technical (40%): Hard 1px outlines are present and consistent across all zoom/bg variants. The gold gradient uses 2-3 hard-shading tones correctly with no anti-aliasing bleed. Pixel-grid is respected throughout. The hand-pixeled corner ornaments show deliberate craft. Technical score ~7. Composite ~6.4 → 6. Marginal: passes technical baseline but needs warmer/rounder emotional language — richer interior treatment, more cohesive corner iconography, and stronger saturated color accents to feel like a true Echoes of Wisdom HUD piece.
